properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 83/22
 NORWEGIAN SEA
 1. ANDOYA SPACE WILL CONDUCT NAVAL ACTIVITIES IN THE PERIOD 1500 TO 2000 UTC DAILY FROM 27 JUN TO 01 JUL 22. 
 VESSELS IS REQUESTED TO BE AWARE OF THE FOLLOWING HAZARD AREA:

 A. 69-07.0N 015-37.0E.
 B. 69-08.0N 015-38.0E.
 C. 69-46.0N 014-55.0E.
 D. 69-46.0N 014-32.0E.
 E. 69-38.0N 014-25.0E.
 F. 69-07.0N 015-34.0E.

 2. FOR COORDINATION ANDOYA SPACE CAN BE CONTACTED ON TELEPHONE 0047 76144582 OR VHF CH 14/16, CALLSIGN (RANGE SAFETY).
 3. REFERS NOTICES TO MARINERS (EFS 11-2022).
 4. CANCEL THIS MESSAGE 012100 UTC JUL 22.
